title: Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies:
Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies!
